data.body:
if you look at conversation #3 for 44f1, term-1774873034101-2p7pxo, , it looks like we hit the same openrouter agent repeatedly, 10 times in a row, and then exited.  

the idea of the multiple takes is to rotate through the models when one fails - specifically to avoid repeated failure loops like this one.
data.title: Claim Loop:  Rotate through available models after failures
